name: Cloak of the Red Agent
description: Notes This cloak is sometimes used as a replacement from the higher tiered cloaks due to the fact that its lower MP cost can let a player using it cloak more times in a row (and thus for a longer duration) than if they were to use a T5 or T6.
effects: After exiting sneak: Fire 2 additional projectiles dealing damage equal to your Lethal Strike damage for 2.4 seconds. Sneak: Invisible for 5 seconds. After 1 second can be canceled by shooting. On Invisible end: Lethal Strike: Your weapon deals 55 (+2 per WIS > 34) and 40% (+0.5% per WIS > 34) of target’s defense as additional damage for 2.4 seconds MP Cost: 2 MP/proj Cooldown: 0.1 sec
